title: Investment fund led by IU students raises $7.8M
description:
Undergraduate students at Indiana University’s Kelley School of Business have raised another $7.8 million for Sample Gates Management Inc., a fund designed to give them hands-on experience in real estate investing.

description:

title: DexKo Global COO Ed Meador to retire at end of May
description:
Michigan-based DexKo Global announced that Ed Meador, its chief operating officer, will retire at the end of May. Meador has helped guide the company’s operations, safety improvements and growth since its founding.

title: Demand for talent fuels expanded Muncie training center for carpenters union
description:
